creator: nadav@libagent.cs.technion.ac.il
text:
I attach a port that intalls Hebrew fonts for use with X. I made the port
Makefile so that it uses a new category called hebrew. I therefore ask for
this category to be added as well (if I get time, I'll submit two more ports
for this category within the coming days). This is my first port submissions,
so please comment if I made any gross mistakes, so I can improve :-)
